prompt: I want to clone https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss and use it as a starting point for my own project. I don't want any of the original git history or remote connections. I'm on Windows.

assertions.name: uses-powershell-syntax
assertions.description: Uses Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .git (not rm -rf) since user is on Windows

assertions.name: uses-depth-flag
assertions.description: Includes --depth 1 in the clone command for efficiency

assertions.name: mentions-gitmodules
assertions.description: Mentions checking for or removing .gitmodules file

assertions.name: offers-fresh-init
assertions.description: Suggests running git init after removal to start fresh
